CONTINUE_RUN.body: Would you like to resume your last AP save for this character? (Yes, AP keeps the save even if you die.)
INSTALL_APWORLD.body:
The APWorld is [i]only necessary[/i] if you're [b]hosting the Archipelago yourself[/b], and to install it you must have the [b]Archipelago Launcher (v0.6.7 or later) installed[/b] for this to work.

This will install in the background and take a few moments, then please restart your launcher. Proceed?
